use_cases: Displaying trends and patterns across multiple data series over time periods
Comparing category performance side-by-side in a stacked or unstacked view
Visualizing data distributions for analytics dashboards in SaaS applications
Showing time-series data in dark-themed fintech and business intelligence tools
Rendering categorical comparisons with customizable color schemes
ai_summary: A dark-themed area chart component for visualizing time-series data across multiple categories. Supports stacked layouts, custom color palettes, and configurable data categories. Wraps SubframeCore's AreaChart with sensible defaults for psychology, business, and biology data series.
